transcript.speaker: Clinician
transcript.text: Well, I can see why your ear is hurting. It's very red around the eardrum. You definitely have an ear infection.

transcript.speaker: Clinician
transcript.text: I'll go ahead and prescribe an antibiotic to help Rio feel better. Sending to the pharmacy right now.

result.information: Antibiotic prescribed for ear infection, sent to the pharmacy.
